title: Paleo-Hebrew Lexicon
description: Comprehensive lexicon for Paleo-Hebrew script translation (10th century BCE - 2nd century CE)

sources: Cross: Paleo-Hebrew and the History of the Alphabet

lexicon.notes: Can mean land, country, or earth
Can mean daughter or house depending on context
Basic motion verb, qal infinitive form
Generic divine designation, chief Canaanite deity
Storm god, fertility deity, also means master/owner
Large body of water, western direction
To act justly, be in the right
Righteous person, one who acts justly
Member of priestly tribe, temple assistant
To rule as king, exercise royal power
